posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
Chinese automakers are taking over the European car market:

European sales of Chinese plug-in hybrid vehicles surged over +300% YoY in March, to a record ~20% of the European hybrid car market.

By comparison, in early 2024, Chinese hybrid sales represented just 2% of the EU hybrid market.

This pushed total Chinese car sales in Europe up nearly +100% YoY in March, to a record 140,094 vehicles.

Now, Chinese cars make up a record 9.4% of the overall European market, tripling over the last 2 years.

Chinese automakers continue to offer some of the most cost-effective vehicles in the market while increasingly matching European brands on technology and features.

Europeans are rushing to buy Chinese cars at an unprecedented pace.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
If you look at this as a business, you’re gonna be disappointed. This is the greatest stock promotion of all time (made better bc you can’t even buy shares today)…

$1T in AI capex so far and revenue has ramped to maybe $3B a month?? A good portion of that is just round-tripping too. Net of electricity, there is almost zero margin and then there’s a depreciation line. It’s all a flaming klown kar. But revs grow fast and the memes do get better over time, so I guess we have to fixate forever on AI…

I still can’t get my mind around how silly this all is. But it probably continues until the IPO. Then we can all laugh at it burning down…
posts.author: hkuppy
